chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-645 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on MA No.2675/2026. 2. For order on office objection. 3. For order on MA No.2676/2026. 4. For hearing of main case. 14.04.2026 Petitioner Zulfiqar Ali Shah present in person. 1. Urgency granted. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 2&4. The petitioner claims to be acting in the public interest. Though the memo of the petition is incomprehensive, we gather from the petitioner’s submission that he seeks a writ by this Court to determine whether citizens of Sindh are being subjected to fatalities by way of cyber-attacks conducted through satellite in space. Clearly the petition is misconceived. Same is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
